zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'Harcourt VI於1342年12月1日出生在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特時，他的父親Jean d'Harcourt III67歲，母親Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle22歲。他於1359年10月14日與Catherine de Bourbon在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年2月28日在他的家鄉享年45歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'Harcourt VI于1342年12月1日出生在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特时，他的父亲Jean d'Harcourt III67岁，母亲Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle22岁。他于1359年10月14日与Catherine de Bourbon在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲盧福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年2月28日在他的家乡享年45岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

nameMeanings.name: d'Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'Harcourt VI was born on 1 December 1342, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Jean d'Harcourt III, was 67 and his mother, Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, was 22. He married Catherine de Bourbon on 14 October 1359, in Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 February 1388, in his hometown, at the age of 45, and was buried in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'Harcourt VI est né le 1 décembre 1342, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Jean d'Harcourt III, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Bourbon le 14 octobre 1359, à Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1388, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'Harcourt VI am 1. Dezember 1342 in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean d'Harcourt III 67 und seine Mutter Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle 22. Er hat am 14. Oktober 1359 in Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Catherine de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1388 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Harcourt VI è nato il il 1 dicembre 1342 nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Jean d'Harcourt III, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de Bourbon il 14 ottobre 1359, nel Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1388, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'Harcourt VIが1342年12月1日にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで生まれた時，父Jean d'Harcourt IIIは67歳，母Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalleは22歳であった。1359年10月14日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスロウvアでCatherine de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年2月28日に故郷で45歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'Harcourt VI(이)가 1342년 12월 1일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean d'Harcourt III(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1359년 10월 14일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 루브르에서 Catherine de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 2월 28일 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에 묻혔다.

pt.1 décembre 1342–28 février 1388: 1 de dezembro de 1342–28 de fevereiro de 1388
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'Harcourt VI nasceu em 1 de dezembro de 1342, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean d'Harcourt III, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Bourbon em 14 de outubro de 1359, em Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1388, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'Harcourt VI родился 1 декабря 1342 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean d'Harcourt III было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Bourbon 14 октября 1359 г. в местности лоувр, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 февраля 1388 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности роуен, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.1 décembre 1342–28 février 1388: 1 de diciembre de 1342–28 de febrero de 1388
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'Harcourt VI nació el 1 de diciembre de 1342, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean d'Harcourt III, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Blanche de Ponthieu Comtesse d'Aumalle, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Catherine de Bourbon el 14 de octubre de 1359, en Louvre, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 28 de febrero de 1388, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
